item.name: Discovery
Brand - Search & Filter

variable.description: The brand ID performing the discovery search

request.description:
Searches and filters influencers from the discovery database. Returns a paginated list of influencer profiles matching the given criteria.

**All fields are optional** — omit any filter to leave it unconstrained.

**Range filters:**
- `followerMin` / `followerMax` (int64) — Follower count range
- `contentMin` / `contentMax` (int) — Number of posts range
- `monthlyViewMin` / `monthlyViewMax` (int64) — Estimated monthly views range
- `monthlyEngagementMin` / `monthlyEngagementMax` (int64) — Monthly engagements range
- `avgViewsMin` / `avgViewsMax` (int64) — Average views per post range
- `avgLikesMin` / `avgLikesMax` (int64) — Average likes per post range
- `avgCommentsMin` / `avgCommentsMax` (int64) — Average comments per post range
- `qualityMin` / `qualityMax` (int, 0–100) — Content quality score range
- `erMin` / `erMax` (float, e.g. 1.5 = 1.5%) — Engagement rate percentage range

**Text filters:**
- `descKeywords` (string[]) — Keywords to search in bio
- `name` (string) — Search by name or username (partial match)

**Flag filters:**
- `isVerified` (bool) — Only verified profiles
- `hasContact` (bool) — Only profiles with contact info

**Multi-select filters:**
- `genders` (string[]) — e.g. ["male", "female"]
- `selectedNiches` (string[]) — e.g. ["fashion", "tech"]
- `selectedLocations` (string[]) — e.g. ["Mumbai", "Delhi"]

**Sorting & Pagination:**
- `sort` (string) — followers | views | engagement | engagements | engagement_rate | er (default: followers)
- `sort_direction` (string) — asc | desc (default: desc)
- `offset` (int) — Pagination offset (default: 0)
- `limit` (int) — Results per page, 1–500 (default: 15)

item.description: APIs for brands to search, filter, and discover influencers from the scraped social profiles database.

item.name: Brand - Influencer Profile

variable.description: The brand ID performing the lookup

request.description:
Fetches the full profile of a discovered influencer including raw social data, calculated analytics, and a normalized user/social representation.

Deducts 1 discovery credit from the brand if this influencer hasn't been viewed before. Returns 400 if the brand has no remaining discovery credits.

**Response includes:**
- `social` — Full raw social profile (name, bio, followers, engagement, links, etc.)
- `analysis` — Calculated metrics:
  - `quality` (int, 0–100) — Content quality score
  - `trustablity` (int, 0–100) — Trust/authenticity score
  - `estimatedBudget` ({min, max} in INR) — Estimated cost per post
  - `estimatedReach` ({min, max}) — Estimated reach range
  - `cpm` (float) — Cost per 1000 impressions
- `influencer.user` — Normalized user object with profile, attachments (profile pic + recent reels)
- `influencer.social` — Platform social object with Instagram profile details

**Side effects:**
- Deducts 1 discovery credit on first view of this influencer
- Adds influencer ID to brand's discoveredInfluencers list

body.raw:
{
	"name": "Priya Sharma",
	"bio": "Fashion & Lifestyle Creator | Mumbai | Collabs: priya@example.com",
	"category": "Fashion",
	"follower_count": 125000,
	"following_count": 850,
	"content_count": 340,
	"views_count": 2500000,
	"engagement_count": 180000,
	"engagement_rate": 3.5,
	"average_views": 18000,
	"average_likes": 4500,
	"average_comments": 120,
	"profile_verified": true,
	"profile_pic": "https://example.com/profile.jpg",
	"profile_pic_hd": "https://example.com/profile_hd.jpg",
	"links": [
		{
			"title": "YouTube",
			"url": "https://youtube.com/@priyasharma",
			"link_type": "youtube"
		}
	],
	"external_id": "12345678901"
}

variable.description: The brand ID performing the update

request.description:
Updates the raw scraped fields of an influencer's social profile. Only explicitly provided fields are updated — omitted fields remain unchanged. Calculated and AI-deduced fields (gender, location, niches, quality_score) cannot be modified through this endpoint.

**Updatable fields (all optional):**
- `name` (string) — Display name
- `bio` (string) — Profile biography
- `profile_pic` (string) — Profile picture URL
- `profile_pic_hd` (string) — HD profile picture URL
- `category` (string) — Profile category
- `profile_verified` (bool) — Verification status
- `follower_count` (int64) — Number of followers
- `following_count` (int64) — Number of accounts followed
- `content_count` (int64) — Number of posts
- `views_count` (int64) — Estimated monthly views
- `engagement_count` (int64) — Estimated monthly engagements
- `engagement_rate` (float32) — Engagement rate percentage
- `average_views` (float32) — Average views per post
- `average_likes` (float32) — Average likes per post
- `average_comments` (float32) — Average comments per post
- `links` (array of {title, url, link_type}) — External links
- `external_id` (string) — External platform user ID

**Protected fields (NOT updatable):**
- `gender`, `location`, `niches`, `quality_score` — AI-deduced
- `id`, `username`, `social_type`, `added_by`, `creation_time` — System/identity

**Side effects:**
- Automatically sets `last_update_time` to current timestamp

item.description: APIs for brands to view and update individual influencer profiles from the discovery database.

item.name: Brand - Invitations

variable.description: The brand ID sending the invitations

request.description:
Sends invitation(s) to one or more discovered influencers for one or more collaborations. Each influencer × collaboration pair creates one invitation and consumes one connection credit.

**Required fields:**
- `influencers` (string[], min 1) — Array of influencer social profile IDs to invite
- `collaborations` (string[], min 1) — Array of collaboration IDs to invite them to

**Side effects:**
- Deducts connection credits from the brand (count = influencers × collaborations)
- Creates invitation records in Firestore with status "waiting"
- Returns 400 if not enough connection credits available

**Response includes:**
- `creditsUsed` (int) — Number of connection credits consumed
- `invitationsSent` (array) — List of created invitation objects

variable.description: The brand ID that owns the collaboration
The collaboration ID to fetch invited influencers for

request.description:
Fetches a paginated list of influencers who were invited to a specific collaboration via the discovery flow. Each item includes the influencer's social profile, invitation timestamp, and current status.

**Request fields:**
- `offset` (int) — Pagination offset (default: 0)
- `limit` (int) — Number of results to return
- `filter` (string) — Filter by invitation status. Leave empty for all statuses. Possible values: "pending", "inprogress", "accepted", "declined", "waiting"

**Response includes:**
- `influencers` (array) — Each item contains:
  - Full social profile data (embedded Socials object)
  - `isDiscover` (bool) — Always true for discovery invitations
  - `invitedAt` (int64, epoch ms) — When the invitation was sent
  - `status` (string) — Current invitation status

item.description: APIs for brands to invite discovered influencers to collaborations and track invitation status.
All discovery-related APIs for the Trendly platform — covering influencer search, profile viewing, profile updates, and invitation management.
